use_cases.UC1: Initial Page State — page loads with three avatars and no visible captions
use_cases.UC2: Single Image Hover - First Avatar — hovering reveals user1 caption and link
use_cases.UC3: Single Image Hover - Second Avatar — hovering reveals user2 caption and link
use_cases.UC4: Single Image Hover - Third Avatar — hovering reveals user3 caption and link
use_cases.UC5: Sequential Hover Behavior — moving between avatars shows only one caption at a time
use_cases.UC6: Navigation via View Profile Links — clicking profile links navigates to user pages
use_cases.UC7: Negative and Boundary Tests — hovering alone does not navigate, captions hide correctly
use_cases.UC8: Caption Content Verification — caption text and link hrefs are correct

tests.title: Verify page load shows three avatar images with no visible captions
Verify all three avatar images are rendered correctly
Hovering over first avatar reveals user1 caption and link
Moving mouse away from first avatar hides its caption
Hovering over second avatar reveals user2 caption and link
Moving mouse away from second avatar hides its caption
Hovering over third avatar reveals user3 caption and link
Moving mouse away from third avatar hides its caption
Hovering from first to second avatar hides first caption and shows second
Hovering from second to third avatar hides second caption and shows third
Hovering from third to first avatar hides third caption and shows first
Hovering all three avatars in sequence shows only one caption at a time
Clicking View profile link for user1 navigates to /users/1
Clicking View profile link for user2 navigates to /users/2
Clicking View profile link for user3 navigates to /users/3
Hovering over page does not trigger navigation
Caption remains hidden when hovering outside avatar area
Rapid hover changes show correct caption without delay
Caption hides correctly when mouse leaves page viewport while hovering
View profile link is not clickable when caption is hidden
First avatar caption displays correct user name format
Second avatar caption displays correct user name format
Third avatar caption displays correct user name format
All View profile links have correct href attributes

defects.title: View profile navigation fails — target page returns empty title
defects.steps: Navigate to /hovers, hover over any avatar, click the 'View profile' link.
defects.expected: Browser navigates to /users/[1-3] and the page loads with title 'The Internet'.
defects.actual: Navigation to /users/[1-3] results in a page with an empty title; toHaveTitle('The Internet') times out after 10 seconds.
